cycle_title: Revise L1 mixture lemma after proof-critic review
completed: Applied the logically valid L1 proof-critic corrections to the conditional mixture statement and derivation.
Kept the primary law conditional on X and Z, scoped the result to per-trial marginals, and did not add a serial-independence assumption.
Recorded proposed decision-gated A-009 conditional choice-kernel sufficiency and A-010 measurable-kernel regularity.
Updated the metadata-only Lean statement shape without asserting a measure-theoretic theorem.
why_it_matters: The revised draft makes the conditional-kernel premise explicit, prevents the per-trial lemma from being misused as a participant-level joint likelihood, and preserves the rejected A-006 boundary.

decision_needed.question: Should T-001 adopt the proposed A-009 conditional choice-kernel sufficiency and A-010 measurable-kernel regularity package before renewed proof review?
options: Approve both proposed assumptions for the bounded T-001 package.
Approve A-009 but request different handling of A-010 standard regularity.
Reject the package and keep C-002 in progress while reframing the result.
decision_needed.default_if_no_response: Keep C-002 in_progress and T-001 decision-gated.

procedure_compliance.notes: Documentation and Lean-statement-shape work only; no restricted RAID data, local-only artifacts, causal claims, or claim promotion.

risks_or_uncertainties: A-009 and A-010 remain decision-gated; C-002 cannot be promoted until the PI decision and renewed proof review.
The Lean file is intentionally a statement shape only and does not formalize measure theory.
next_bounded_task: Obtain PI direction on A-009 and A-010, then conduct renewed proof-critic review of the revised Lemma 1.1.
